center.name: 伊利亚贝拉
center.summary: 伊利亚贝拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Riparian parrotlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Riparian parrotlets are found in southeastern Colombia to northern Peru and western Brazil. There is a small population on São Sebastião Island. Though they do not fully migrate, it has been suggested that riparian parrotlets are altitudinal migrants: abundance of the species in lowland areas increased during winter and spring; this is likely because during these seasons, the main plants of the large-billed parrotlets' diet were budding and providing more food. Riparian parrotlets tend to inhabit forest edges, riparian woodlands, and degraded or deforested areas
